title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as users shift from 'tokenmaxxing' to efficiency
summary_full: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.
summary_public: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.
